parameters.query:
SELECT s.telefono, l.nombre, s.tipo, s.clases_restantes,
       to_char(s.vence_at,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS vence_at
FROM bejauha.saldos_clases s
JOIN bejauha.leads l ON l.telefono = s.telefono
WHERE s.pausado = false
  AND s.clases_restantes > 0
  AND s.vence_at = current_date + INTERVAL '14 days';

WITH expired AS (
  SELECT s.telefono, l.nombre, (current_date - s.pausa_inicio)::int AS dias_pausado, s.vence_at AS vence_at_old, s.tipo
  FROM bejauha.saldos_clases s
  JOIN bejauha.leads l ON l.telefono = s.telefono
  WHERE s.pausado = true AND s.pausa_inicio IS NOT NULL
    AND (current_date - s.pausa_inicio) >= 30
),
upd AS (
  UPDATE bejauha.saldos_clases s
  SET pausado = false, vence_at = s.vence_at + INTERVAL '30 days', pausa_inicio = NULL, actualizado_at = now()
  FROM expired e
  WHERE s.telefono = e.telefono AND s.tipo = e.tipo
  RETURNING s.telefono, s.vence_at AS vence_at_new
)
SELECT e.telefono, e.nombre, e.dias_pausado, to_char(u.vence_at_new,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS vence_at_new FROM expired e JOIN upd u ON u.telefono = e.telefono;

WITH stale AS (
  SELECT h.id, h.telefono, h.resumen, h.created_at, l.nombre
  FROM bejauha.handoffs h
  LEFT JOIN bejauha.leads l ON l.telefono = h.telefono
  WHERE h.estado = 'pendiente'
    AND h.created_at < now() - INTERVAL '48 hours'
),
upd_h AS (
  UPDATE bejauha.handoffs h SET estado = 'atendido', atendido_at = now()
  FROM stale s WHERE h.id = s.id RETURNING h.id
),
upd_l AS (
  UPDATE bejauha.leads l SET asignado_humano = false
  FROM stale s WHERE l.telefono = s.telefono AND l.asignado_humano = true
  RETURNING l.telefono
)
SELECT s.telefono, COALESCE(s.nombre, s.telefono) AS nombre, LEFT(COALESCE(s.resumen,''), 80) AS resumen,
       EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - s.created_at))/3600 AS horas_pendiente
FROM stale s ORDER BY s.created_at;
